billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your subscription and billing details.
billing.readOnly: Only administrators can manage billing and subscriptions.
billing.resyncHint: Re-read your subscription from Stripe if it looks out of date.

cancelBanner.body: Your {plan} plan will cancel on {date}. You'll keep its features until then.

confirm.cancelBody: You'll keep your {plan} plan until {date}, then automatically move to the Free plan. You can resume any time before then.
confirm.cancelBodyNoDate: You'll keep your {plan} plan until the end of the current period, then move to the Free plan.
confirm.upgradeBody: You'll move to {plan} ({interval}) now. We'll charge the prorated difference for the rest of this billing period.
confirm.downgradeBody: You'll move to {plan} ({interval}) now. We'll apply a prorated credit to your next invoice.

feedback.canceled: Your subscription will cancel at the end of the period.
feedback.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
